results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile robot tasked to visit two locations: (7,1) and (4,8). The available actions are: "MoveTo".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <MoveTo x="7" y="1"/>
      <MoveTo x="4" y="8"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
            <Sequence>
                <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/>
                <MoveTo x="1" y="1"/>
                <MoveTo x="2" y="2"/>
                <MoveTo x="3" y="3"/>
            </Sequence>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.generated_raw:
Behavior tree = sequence visit both locations.

```xml
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Sequence name="visit_two_locations">
            <MoveTo name="go_to_first"  x="7" y="1"/>
            <MoveTo name="go_to_second" x="4" y="8"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```

Logic: `Sequence` run children left→right. MoveTo (7,1) first, then MoveTo (4,8). Sequence succeed only if both succeed.

</root>

      <MoveTo x="2" y="3" threshold="20"/>
      <MoveTo x="4" y="7" threshold="13"/>
      <MoveTo x="0" y="0" threshold="10"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile robot tasked to visit a sequence of locations: (0,0), (2,3), (4, 7), (5, 11).  During the navigation a location may become unreachable, if this happens, skip it and move to the next one.  The available actions are: "MoveTo", "isGoalReachable".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
      <Sequence> 
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="2" y="3"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>         
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="4" y="7"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>   
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="5" y="11"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>
      </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done />
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Sequence>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="0" y="0" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="1" y="1" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="2" y="2" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="3" y="3" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.generated_raw:
Behavior: each location check reachable → move. Unreachable → skip, keep going. Wrap each in Fallback so failure no halt outer Sequence.

```xml
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="0" y="0"/>
          <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="2" y="3"/>
          <MoveTo x="2" y="3"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="4" y="7"/>
          <MoveTo x="4" y="7"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="5" y="11"/>
          <MoveTo x="5" y="11"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```

Logic: `isGoalReachable` fail → inner Sequence fail → `AlwaysSuccess` fire → Fallback succeed → outer Sequence advance to next location. Skip done.
results.generated_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="0" y="0"/>
          <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="2" y="3"/>
          <MoveTo x="2" y="3"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="4" y="7"/>
          <MoveTo x="4" y="7"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
      <Fallback>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable x="5" y="11"/>
          <MoveTo x="5" y="11"/>
        </Sequence>
        <AlwaysSuccess/>
      </Fallback>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.llm_judge_raw:
Correct

Tree logic:
- **Outer Sequence**: Enforces visit order (0,0) → (2,3) → (4,7) → (5,11)
- **Each Fallback**: 
  - Try: `isGoalReachable` + `MoveTo` sequence
  - If reachable: execute both, succeed
  - If unreachable: `isGoalReachable` fails → Fallback tries `AlwaysSuccess` → skips to next location
  
Matches description exactly. Skip-on-unreachable handled via Fallback structure.

results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile robot tasked asked to explore an area.  The available actions are: "GenerateNextDestination", "MoveTo", "isExplorationComplete".
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="10">
                    <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                </RetryUntilSuccessful>
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Sequence>
            <GenerateNextDestination/>
            <MoveToDestination/>
            <CheckForExplorationComplete/>
        </Sequence>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.generated_raw:
XML for explore-until-complete loop:

```xml
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Fallback>
      <isExplorationComplete/>
      <Sequence>
        <GenerateNextDestination/>
        <MoveTo/>
      </Sequence>
    </Fallback>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```

Logic: check `isExplorationComplete` first. If done → success. Else generate next dest + move. Tick repeatedly (parent loops tree) to drive exploration till complete.

results.description: The behavior tree represents a manipulator tasked to find and reach a target.  The manipulator moves in different locations and check for the presence of a target object.  When the target is found, approach it.  The available actions are: "MoveTo", "CheckForTarget", "PickTarget".
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="10">
                    <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                </RetryUntilSuccessful>
                <Done />
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <MoveToNewConfiguration />
                <CheckForTarget />
            </Sequence>
            <ApproachTarget />
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.generated_raw:
Search-then-pick pattern. Robot visit locations, check each, pick when found. Fallback = stop at first success.

```xml
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Fallback>
      <Sequence>
        <CheckForTarget/>
        <PickTarget/>
      </Sequence>
      <Sequence>
        <MoveTo x="1" y="1"/>
        <CheckForTarget/>
        <PickTarget/>
      </Sequence>
      <Sequence>
        <MoveTo x="5" y="2"/>
        <CheckForTarget/>
        <PickTarget/>
      </Sequence>
      <Sequence>
        <MoveTo x="3" y="7"/>
        <CheckForTarget/>
        <PickTarget/>
      </Sequence>
    </Fallback>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```

Logic: each branch move→check→pick. First branch check current spot. Fallback stop when one branch succeed (target found + picked). Locations are placeholder coords — swap for real ones.

results.description: The behavior tree represents a manipulator tasked to perform a pick and place routine.  The manipulator observe the item from multiple points of view and each time tries to estimate a grasp.  If the systems fails to identify a grasp after five observations, the action fails and the arm return to a resting position. When the grasp is successfully estimated, the manipulator moves to the "ready" state, picks the item and drop it to a predefined location, a chest in this case. After the drop, the arm moves to a resting position.  The available actions are:  "EstimateGrasp", "Pick", "Drop", "MoveManipulator".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
      <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
          <Sequence>
              <EstimateGrasp/>
              <MoveManipulator state="ready"/>
              <Pick object="item"/>
              <Drop location="chest"/>
              <MoveManipulator state="resting"/>
          </Sequence>
      </RetryUntilSuccessful>
  </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4"  main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    
    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
                    <Sequence>
                        <PerformObservation />
                        <EstimateGrasp />
                    </Sequence>
                </RetryUntilSuccessful>
                <Pick />
                <MoveToDropPosition />
                <Drop />
                <MoveToRestPosition />
            </Sequence>
            <MoveToRestPosition />
        </Fallback>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.generated_raw:
BT structure: Fallback wraps success-path Sequence + rest fallback. RetryUntilSuccessful(5) loops observe+estimate.

```xml
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Fallback>
      <Sequence>
        <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
          <Sequence>
            <MoveManipulator target="observation"/>
            <EstimateGrasp/>
          </Sequence>
        </RetryUntilSuccessful>
        <MoveManipulator target="ready"/>
        <Pick/>
        <Drop target="chest"/>
        <MoveManipulator target="rest"/>
      </Sequence>
      <MoveManipulator target="rest"/>
    </Fallback>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```

Logic:
- `RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5"` → observe new viewpoint + `EstimateGrasp`, retry up to 5 times.
- Grasp ok → ready, Pick, Drop chest, rest.
- 5 fails → inner Sequence fail → Fallback hit last child → `MoveManipulator target="rest"`.
results.generated_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Fallback>
      <Sequence>
        <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
          <Sequence>
            <MoveManipulator target="observation"/>
            <EstimateGrasp/>
          </Sequence>
        </RetryUntilSuccessful>
        <MoveManipulator target="ready"/>
        <Pick/>
        <Drop target="chest"/>
        <MoveManipulator target="rest"/>
      </Sequence>
      <MoveManipulator target="rest"/>
    </Fallback>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

results.description: The behavior tree represents a manipulator tasked to push buttons in a specific sequence to transform raw materials into processed materials. Use "Button R" to receive the raw materials. Use "Button P" to start the processing. Use "Button C" to complete the processing.  The manipulator has to first receive the raw material, then start the processing, and finally complete the processing.  The manipulator has to periodically check the status of the materials to decide when the processing is complete. The available actions are: "PressButton", "EvaluateProcessing".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
      <EvaluateProcessing/>                              
      <Sequence>
        <PressButton button="Button R"/>
        <PressButton button="Button P"/>
        <PressButton button="Button C"/>
      </Sequence>
    </Parallel>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <SequenceWithMemory>
            <PressButton label="Button R"/>
            <PressButton label="Button P"/>
            <Sequence>
                <EvaluateProcessing/>
            </Sequence>
            <PressButton label="Button C"/>
        </SequenceWithMemory>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.generated_raw:
Behavior = sequence: receive raw → start processing → poll status til done → complete.

Poll = retry EvaluateProcessing until SUCCESS (periodic check).

```xml
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <PressButton button="Button R"/>
      <PressButton button="Button P"/>
      <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="-1">
        <EvaluateProcessing/>
      </RetryUntilSuccessful>
      <PressButton button="Button C"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```

Logic:
- `Button R` → receive raw material
- `Button P` → start processing
- `RetryUntilSuccessful` → loop `EvaluateProcessing` til processing complete (periodic status check). `num_attempts="-1"` = infinite retries.
- `Button C` → complete processing
results.generated_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <PressButton button="Button R"/>
      <PressButton button="Button P"/>
      <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="-1">
        <EvaluateProcessing/>
      </RetryUntilSuccessful>
      <PressButton button="Button C"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root BTCPP_format="4">

      <MoveTo location="Station C"/>
      <Pick from="tray" item="Component A"/>
      <Drop to="Station C"/>

      <Drop to="tray"/>
